prophecies.q: 塞拉芬论基督徒生活的真正目标
prophecies.a: 基督徒生活的真正目标不在于斋戒、祈祷、守夜或行善——这些只是手段。真正的目标是获得上帝的圣灵。只有以基督之名行善，才能积聚圣灵的恩赐。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim on the true aim of Christian life
prophecies.a_en: The true aim of the Christian life consists not in fasting, prayer, vigil, or good works — these are merely the means. The true aim is the acquisition of the Holy Spirit of God. Only good deeds done in Christ's name bring us the fruits of the Holy Spirit.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬论圣灵降临的体验
prophecies.a: 当上帝的圣灵降临于人、充满其灵魂与肉体时，那人便沐浴在神圣之光中。此时内心充满无法言喻的平安与喜乐。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim on the experience of the Holy Spirit's descent
prophecies.a_en: When the Spirit of God descends upon a person and fills their soul and body, that person is bathed in divine light. The heart is then filled with an inexpressible peace and joy.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬预言俄罗斯将经历巨大灾难
prophecies.a: 俄罗斯将经历巨大的灾难。东正教信仰将遭到迫害，教堂将被关闭和摧毁。无数信徒将殉道。沙皇和他的全家将被杀害。河流将被鲜血染红。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim foretold great calamity for Russia
prophecies.a_en: Russia will undergo great calamities. The Orthodox faith will be persecuted, churches will be closed and destroyed. Countless believers will be martyred. The Tsar and his entire family will be killed. Rivers will run red with blood.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1917年俄国革命推翻了沙皇制度。1918年7月17日沙皇尼古拉二世全家被布尔什维克处决。苏联时期大规模迫害东正教：关闭数万座教堂，处决数以千计的神职人员和信徒。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 1917 Russian Revolution overthrew the Tsarist regime. On July 17, 1918, Tsar Nicholas II and his entire family were executed by the Bolsheviks. During the Soviet era, the Orthodox Church faced massive persecution: tens of thousands of churches were closed, and thousands of clergy and believers were executed.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬预言沙皇的封圣与灾难的关联
prophecies.a: 有一位沙皇将为我举行封圣礼。在此之后，俄罗斯大地将降临长久的苦难。海一般的泪水将被流淌。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim linked his own canonization to coming disaster
prophecies.a_en: A Tsar will come who will glorify me. After that, great and prolonged suffering will befall the Russian land. A sea of tears will be shed.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1903年沙皇尼古拉二世力排众议坚持为塞拉芬封圣。此后俄罗斯接连经历1904-1905年日俄战争失败、1905年革命、第一次世界大战，最终在1917年爆发革命，沙皇制度覆灭。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1903, Tsar Nicholas II insisted on Seraphim's canonization against opposition. Russia subsequently suffered defeat in the Russo-Japanese War (1904-1905), the 1905 Revolution, World War I, and finally the 1917 Revolution that destroyed the Tsarist system.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬预言俄罗斯将经历一场伟大的战争
prophecies.a: 在那些苦难的日子里，将有一场伟大的战争。敌人将深入俄罗斯腹地，大地将遍布废墟。但俄罗斯最终将取得胜利，敌人将被驱逐。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim foretold a great war for Russia
prophecies.a_en: In those days of suffering, there will be a great war. The enemy will penetrate deep into the heart of Russia, and the land will be covered in ruins. But Russia will ultimately prevail, and the enemy will be expelled.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 第二次世界大战期间，纳粹德国于1941年入侵苏联，深入俄罗斯腹地直至莫斯科和斯大林格勒郊外。战争造成苏联约2700万人死亡、大片国土被毁。1945年苏联最终取得胜利，将纳粹势力彻底驱逐。
prophecies.verdict_en: During World War II, Nazi Germany invaded the Soviet Union in 1941, penetrating deep into Russia to the outskirts of Moscow and Stalingrad. The war caused approximately 27 million Soviet deaths and widespread destruction. The Soviet Union ultimately achieved victory in 1945, completely expelling the Nazi forces.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬预言信仰将在俄罗斯复兴
prophecies.a: 在所有苦难之后，俄罗斯将复兴，并非通过物质力量，而是通过信仰的力量。东正教信仰将重新在俄罗斯大地上闪耀光芒。人们将重新回到教堂。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim foretold the revival of faith in Russia
prophecies.a_en: After all the suffering, Russia will be resurrected, not by material power but by the power of faith. The Orthodox faith will shine again on Russian soil. People will return to the churches.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1991年苏联解体后，俄罗斯经历了大规模的东正教信仰复兴。数千座教堂被重建或重新开放，东正教会重新成为俄罗斯社会的重要力量。2000年代教堂出席率显著上升，东正教信仰成为俄罗斯国家认同的核心要素之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the collapse of the Soviet Union in 1991, Russia experienced a massive revival of Orthodox faith. Thousands of churches were rebuilt or reopened, and the Orthodox Church regained a prominent role in Russian society. Church attendance rose significantly in the 2000s, with Orthodoxy becoming a core element of Russian national identity.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬预言萨罗夫修道院的命运
prophecies.a: 萨罗夫修道院将被关闭，修士们将四散流亡。但这座修道院终将重新开放，一切将恢复原样。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim foretold the fate of Sarov Monastery
prophecies.a_en: The Sarov Monastery will be closed and the monks will be dispersed into exile. But the monastery will eventually reopen, and everything will be restored.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 萨罗夫修道院于1927年被苏联当局关闭，修士被驱散，部分建筑被改为军事设施（后成为核武器研发基地「阿尔扎马斯-16」）。1991年苏联解体后，修道院部分区域于2006年正式归还东正教会并恢复宗教活动。
prophecies.verdict_en: Sarov Monastery was closed by Soviet authorities in 1927. Monks were dispersed, and parts of the complex were converted to military facilities (later becoming the nuclear research center 'Arzamas-16'). After the Soviet collapse in 1991, parts of the monastery were officially returned to the Orthodox Church in 2006 and religious activities resumed.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬预言迪维耶沃修道院的未来
prophecies.a: 迪维耶沃修道院将成为世界上第四处圣母领地，仅次于伊比利亚、阿索斯山和基辅。在末世时代，主将在此保护信徒。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim on the future of Diveyevo Convent
prophecies.a_en: The Diveyevo Convent will become the fourth and final lot of the Most Holy Mother of God on earth, after Iberia, Mount Athos, and Kiev. In the end times, the Lord will protect the faithful here.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 迪维耶沃修道院1927年被苏联关闭。1991年苏联解体后修道院重新开放，1991年塞拉芬圣髑在此被重新安置。如今迪维耶沃已成为俄罗斯最重要的东正教朝圣地之一，每年吸引数十万朝圣者。
prophecies.verdict_en: Diveyevo Convent was closed by the Soviets in 1927. After the Soviet collapse, the convent reopened in 1991 and Seraphim's relics were reinterred there. Today Diveyevo is one of the most important Orthodox pilgrimage sites in Russia, attracting hundreds of thousands of pilgrims annually.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬论敌基督的降临
prophecies.a: 在末日之前，敌基督将降临人间。他最初将以和平缔造者和慈善家的面貌出现，赢得全世界的拥戴。但他将建立一个统治全球的暴政。只有坚守正教信仰的人才能识破他的伪装。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim on the coming of the Antichrist
prophecies.a_en: Before the end of days, the Antichrist will come into the world. He will initially appear as a peacemaker and benefactor, winning the adoration of the entire world. But he will establish a tyranny that rules the globe. Only those who hold fast to the Orthodox faith will see through his deception.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬预言自己圣髑的命运
prophecies.a: 我的遗体将被找到，被从地下取出，我的圣髑将被安放在迪维耶沃。到那时，俄罗斯将开始她的复兴之路。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim foretold the fate of his own relics
prophecies.a_en: My remains will be found and raised from the earth. My relics will be placed in Diveyevo. At that time, Russia will begin her path of resurrection.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 塞拉芬的圣髑在苏联时期失踪。1991年，其圣髑在列宁格勒（圣彼得堡）的一座博物馆中被重新发现，随后经隆重仪式迁移至迪维耶沃修道院安放。此事件恰与苏联解体和俄罗斯东正教信仰复兴同时发生。
prophecies.verdict_en: Seraphim's relics disappeared during the Soviet era. In 1991, they were rediscovered in a museum in Leningrad (St. Petersburg) and ceremonially transferred to the Diveyevo Convent. This event coincided with the collapse of the Soviet Union and the revival of Orthodox faith in Russia.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬论俄罗斯的灵性使命
prophecies.a: 俄罗斯将成为全世界的灯塔。当西方沉沦于物质主义和不信之中时，俄罗斯将以信仰之光照亮世界。其他民族将向俄罗斯寻求灵性指引。
prophecies.a_en: Russia will become a beacon to the entire world. When the West sinks into materialism and unbelief, Russia will illuminate the world with the light of faith. Other nations will look to Russia for spiritual guidance.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬论获得内心平安
prophecies.a: 你要在自己心中获得平安的灵，你周围就会有千万人得到拯救。这不是通过外在的言辞，而是通过你内在的宁静所散发的力量。
prophecies.a_en: Acquire the spirit of peace within yourself, and thousands around you will be saved. This is achieved not through outward words, but through the power radiating from your inner stillness.

prophecies.q: 塞拉芬预言末世前的社会景象
prophecies.a: 在末日来临之前，人们将变得越来越邪恶。他们将互相残杀，甚至不顾血缘亲情。大地将充满罪恶，但那些坚守信仰的人将如星辰般闪耀。
prophecies.q_en: Seraphim on society before the end times
prophecies.a_en: Before the end comes, people will grow ever more wicked. They will slaughter one another, disregarding even bonds of blood. The earth will be filled with sin, but those who hold fast to the faith will shine like stars.
